T0167.title: Insider-Verified Data
T0167.definition: In underground data trading, a term indicating a high success rate or zero-failure queries, often implying data sourced through corrupt insiders within law enforcement. In actual illicit negotiations, 'no blind spots' is used as a coded reference to such channels.
T0167.description: In underground data trading, a term indicating a high success rate or zero-failure queries, often implying data sourced through corrupt insiders within law enforcement. In actual illicit negotiations, 'no blind spots' is used as a coded reference to such channels.
T0167.usageExample: "No blind spots for corporate or personal bank statements — 2 years, 3 years, account opening. Departing Thursday. Bulk or individual orders accepted."
